title: Change Log
content: {"time":1783922538892,"blocks":[{"id":"gp-OdC9jiT","type":"header","data":{"text":"Change Log","level":2},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"M7_E7ruWvu","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"All notable changes to SonaCMS are documented here."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"hkhEHlc_om","type":"header","data":{"text":"[1.1] — 11 July 2026","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"1wg4dW0JHc","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Added"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"88amOGE8gB","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Automatic XML sitemap "},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"KqmIdF3lSf","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"SonaCMS now generates an SEO sitemap dynamically from your published pages, served at /sitemap.xml. It builds hierarchical URLs from your page tree, excludes drafts automatically, and includes <lastmod> dates — so it stays accurate with no manual maintenance. Submit it to Google Search Console and forget about it."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"WhksIMg4Ls","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Canonical URLs"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"fxX-tUp4pS","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Every page now outputs a <link rel=\"canonical\"> tag built from a new site_url config value. This tells search engines which domain owns your content, even if the site is reachable through another domain pointing at the same server — preventing duplicate-content issues and making sure your real domain gets the credit. Open Graph image URLs and the sitemap use the same canonical base."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"xiHjEMoPOc","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Code block in the editor"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"G_q8fraCz0","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"A new Code block for the page editor, with an optional language label. Preserves indentation and whitespace exactly, escapes content safely, and renders inside <pre><code> on the frontend. Built for documentation and tutorial pages."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"GyetjUsbYz","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"robots.txt"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"pPbUPzUnje","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Ships with a sensible default: allows crawling of public pages, blocks the admin and internal directories, and points crawlers at the sitemap."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"hahxrthvld","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Changed"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"wChlO0eDM5","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":".htaccess now includes a rewrite rule serving /sitemap.xml from the sitemap generator."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"P87_MQocpr","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Font stacks no longer lead with Helvetica. On some Linux systems Helvetica is aliased to a font with mismapped glyphs, which could render editor menu labels as garbled text. Stacks now start with Arial, which resolves correctly everywhere."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"wtHoVJPHUn","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Upgrade notes"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"i1awyw1YpZ","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"If you're upgrading from 1.0:"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"fJfH6ediu4","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Add site_url to SonaCMS/config.php — your site's canonical address, with no trailing slash. For example: 'site_url' => 'https://www.yoursite.com',"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"rYDeobCed4","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Upload the new sitemap.php and robots.txt to your web root."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"LgfYvbhDJa","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Add the sitemap rewrite rule to your .htaccess, above the existing RewriteCond lines:"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"d46VouC14h","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"RewriteRule ^sitemap\\.xml$ sitemap.php [L]"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"l1jpp5wCK2","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Replace index.php, and the files in SonaCMS/app/ and SonaCMS/vendor/."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"wqrpvcyoED","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Your customisations in /inc/, /css/, /forms/ and config.php are untouched by upgrades — as always."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"VPQbKGAfwX","type":"header","data":{"text":"[1.0] — 9 July 2026","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"x-vwqbu2G7","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Initial public release."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"MozqRsrZi2","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"A flat-file CMS with no database. Content is stored as JSON files, so there's nothing to install, nothing to back up, and nothing to pay for month after month."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"BG5Mz6v5bh","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Content management"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"IzKe0UTCgt","type":"list","data":{"style":"unordered","meta":{},"items":[{"content":"Block-based page editor built on Editor.js","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Hierarchical pages with parent/child nesting and clean URLs","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Page ordering and show/hide control for navigation menus","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Draft and published states","meta":{},"items":[]},{"content":"Reusable author tiles, managed separately and inserted anywhere","meta":{},"items":[]}]}},{"id":"eA3dOhhYO_","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Editor blocks"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"L7cvZv729K","type":"list","data":{"style":"unordered","meta":{},"items":[{"content":"Text, headings, lists, quotes, images, video embeds, buttons, multi-column layouts, forms, and author tiles — plus inline emoji and text alignment.","meta":{},"items":[]}]}},{"id":"hMwCYEDFZ5","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Forms"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"MLDXgYOS06","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Drop any PHP form file into /forms/ and it appears in the editor automatically."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"L0JK9fIs4_","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"A generic handler emails submissions to you, with honeypot spam protection and automatic switching between PHP mail() and SMTP (e.g. SMTP2GO)."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"sRe1X1FMmI","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"SEO and sharing"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"Wswg9f_j_U","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Per-page meta descriptions and keywords, plus per-page social share images for link previews on X, Facebook, LinkedIn and elsewhere."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"gaAm8kbE0n","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Built to be restyled"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"CqG0ZeJVtG","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"The frontend ships deliberately unstyled. Everything a developer touches — navigation, footer, 404 page, form handling, and all CSS — lives outside the CMS core and survives upgrades."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}}],"version":"2.31.6"}
